corrections.text: Both phys.org URLs cited in the article returned HTTP 403 to the Chief Editor's snapshot fetcher. The specifics those URLs back — UF paper DOI, 'orders of magnitude' precision framing, 'within a few years' Jain timeline, HKUST methodology, Cas13 comparison — are independently verifiable in the accessible source set (UF News, HKUST release, the two Nature DOIs). The Hsing 'The RNA guide molecule is like the address you type in, and the Cas protein is the car' quote is sourced exclusively to phys.org and could not be independently verified in the accessible snapshots; the conceptual framing is supported by source-3.

Two of the cited sources (news.ufl.edu and miragenews.com) were not on the project's source allowlist at submission time. Both are reputable — UF News is the official University of Florida news service hosting the primary press release, and Mirage News is an Australia-based science news aggregator that often relays the same source material as international wires.
